summary: Doc build failed because a Python SyntaxError occurred while importing transformers.modeling_utils, caused by a leftover merge conflict marker. This prevented converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to MDX.
root_cause: A leftover git merge conflict marker ('<<<<<<< sonic-moe') in /home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/transformers/modeling_utils.py caused a SyntaxError during import, which broke the doc conversion for llama.md.

evidence.reason: Shows the Python file and line where the error occurred.
Contains the git merge conflict marker that is invalid Python syntax.
The interpreter raised a SyntaxError at the location with the merge marker.

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Shows the doc conversion that failed as a result of the SyntaxError.

suggested_fix: Open /home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/transformers/modeling_utils.py, remove or resolve the leftover merge conflict markers (e.g., '<<<<<<< sonic-moe'), ensure the file is syntactically valid, and re-run the documentation build.
